title: Hybrid Blockchain App
description: 1st Runner-up submission for Indian Bank's Innovision Hackathon 2025. A hybrid blockchain application that combines the benefits of both public and private blockchains. Utilizes Hyperledger Fabric for transactions and Ethereum for decentralization.
